overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from a western-themed game showing a first-person walk through a stormy frontier town at night. The player moves along a muddy main street illuminated by warm gas lamps while heavy rain falls and lightning strikes, eventually reaching the edge of town where horse riders pass by on the open road.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy night in a frontier town, with the camera walking down a muddy main street lined with wooden buildings. Warm gas lamps illuminate the wet ground while heavy rain falls, and a sudden lightning strike flashes across the sky at the end of the segment.

segments.scene_description: Moving past the town center, the camera approaches the outskirts where wooden buildings give way to open grass fields. A wooden fence appears on the right while the street lamps become more spaced out, and the storm continues with heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open road outside town with stormy sky

segments.scene_description: Now outside the town proper, the camera moves along an open dirt road flanked by grass fields and wooden fencing. Two riders on horseback pass by through the heavy rain—one galloping away from town on a brown horse, and another entering on a white horse—while lightning continues to flash in the stormy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic, lamp-lit center of a frontier town out into the expansive, storm-swept wilderness. It begins by walking down a muddy main street lined with wooden buildings, where warm gas lamps reflect off the wet ground amidst a heavy downpour. As the camera moves past the town center, the dense architecture gives way to open grass fields and a wooden fence, while the street lamps grow sparse and a sudden flash of lightning illuminates the sky. The scene then opens further onto a dirt road flanked by fencing and wild grass, shifting the focus from the town's structures to the open road. Finally, the camera continues forward through the rain as two riders on horseback, one on a brown horse and one on a white horse, pass by under a sky still flickering with lightning.
